---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve
<!-- The user-facing pain or research question. Not "we should add X" but "today doing Y is impossible / awkward because Z". -->

## Proposed shape
<!-- Sketch of the change. CLI flag? new agent type? new web URL param? Cite the relevant file paths if you've already read them. -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Other ways to skin it, and why they're worse. -->

## Out-of-scope
<!-- What this issue explicitly does NOT cover (helps reviewers right-size). -->
